value.title: Menu — Creole Dining & Craft Cocktails | Louisiana Purchase North Park
value.description: Explore the full Louisiana Purchase menu — elevated Creole dinner plates, an obsessive craft cocktail program, and weekend brunch. Chef Quinnton Austin's fire-forward Louisiana kitchen in North Park, San Diego.

value.title: The Menu
value.subtitle: Chef Quinnton Austin's fire-forward Creole kitchen, an obsessive craft cocktail program, and a weekend brunch worth planning your Saturday around.
value.imageAlt: Louisiana Purchase menu — North Park San Diego

value.title: Three Programs.
value.subtitle: Dinner, cocktails, and weekend brunch — each built with the same obsessive care. Explore each program below.

cards.imageAlt: Dinner at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego
cards.title: Dinner
cards.body: Fire-charred oysters, Louisiana BBQ shrimp, slow-built gumbo, and elevated Creole plates from Chef Quinnton Austin's kitchen.

cards.imageAlt: Gin & Juice craft cocktail at Louisiana Purchase North Park
cards.title: Cocktails
cards.body: A French Quarter-rooted bar program. Superbird Palomas, Watermelon Margaritas, Hurricane Pops — bold, playful, unforgettable.

cards.imageAlt: Weekend brunch spread at Louisiana Purchase North Park
cards.title: Brunch
cards.body: North Park's most indulgent weekend ritual. Creole brunch plates, craft cocktails from noon, and an open patio built for lingering.

value.imageAlt: Fire-charred oysters and Creole plates at Louisiana Purchase
value.title: Chef Quinnton Austin's
body: Every plate at Louisiana Purchase is a deliberate act. Chef Quinnton Austin's culinary program is built on the traditions of Louisiana cooking — fire, patience, and obsessive precision. Fire-charred oysters. Slow-built dark roux gumbo. Gulf shrimp in Worcestershire butter.
The menu changes with the season but the commitment never does. This is elevated Creole dining done with complete sincerity.

value.imageAlt: Craft cocktails at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego
value.title: Cocktails Built for
body: The bar program at Louisiana Purchase is not an afterthought. Every cocktail is rooted in New Orleans tradition — complex, ceremonial, and built with the same precision as the kitchen. The Praline Old Fashioned alone is worth the visit.
Happy Hour runs Monday through Friday from 3 to 5 PM. The full cocktail menu is available from open to close, seven days a week.

value.imageAlt: Weekend brunch at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego
value.title: Saturday & Sunday
body: The brunch program at Louisiana Purchase is its own institution. Creole plates inspired by New Orleans weekend dining, craft cocktails from noon, and a patio that turns a Saturday afternoon into an event.
Brunch runs every Saturday and Sunday from 12 PM to 3 PM. Reservations are strongly recommended.

value.title: Signature Dishes
value.subtitle: The plates and drinks that define Louisiana Purchase. Start here.

value.title: Reserve Your Table.
value.subtitle: Louisiana Purchase is open daily. Walk-ins welcome at the bar.
